summary: Comprehensive testing of golf course detail pages - All critical features working correctly. Backend API (28/28 tests passed), Frontend pages load correctly with all sections visible.

issues: SEO meta tags (og:title, og:description) show site-wide defaults instead of course-specific values. Document title is correctly updated per course.

tests: All 16 SEO courses exist and are accessible

golf-alcanada.breadcrumb: PASS - Home > Golf Courses > Golf Alcanada
golf-alcanada.document_title: PASS - Golf Alcanada - Mallorca's Premier Coastal Course | Book Tee Times

golf-son-gual.document_title: PASS - Golf Son Gual - Europe's Premier Championship Course | Book Tee Times Mallorca

homepage.course_name_links: PASS - Also links to detail pages

navigation.related_course_click: PASS - Navigates to correct course page

passed_tests: Backend API - GET /api/golf-courses/{id} returns correct data
Backend API - All 16 courses from SEO data exist
Golf course page renders at /golf-courses/golf-alcanada with all sections
Golf course page renders at /golf-courses/golf-son-gual (dynamic routing verified)
Breadcrumb navigation shows Home > Golf Courses > Course Name
Back to All Courses link navigates to /#courses
Book Tee Time button links to external booking URL
Related courses section shows 3 other courses
Clicking related course card navigates correctly
View Details button links to individual course pages
Course name link in cards navigates to detail page
Document title updates correctly for each course page
action_items: OPTIONAL: Implement dynamic SEO meta tags (og:title, og:description) per course page to improve social sharing
critical_code_review_comments: GolfCourseLanding.jsx properly handles React.lazy loading and Suspense fallback
Document title is correctly updated via useEffect when course data loads
API fallback to hardcoded GOLF_COURSES data works correctly when MongoDB is empty
Related courses section correctly filters out current course and limits to 3
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Golf course detail pages fully tested and working. Backend API returns correct data for all 16 courses. Frontend pages render correctly with hero, about, details, features, season, booking sidebar, location, and related courses sections. Navigation works between homepage and detail pages. Only minor issue: SEO meta tags (og:title, og:description) use site defaults instead of course-specific values - document title IS correctly updated per course.
